posts.author: siva
posts.text: Brokerage charges comparison — We started with 20 in 2010, later made delivery free, not sure if broker can sustain with much lower rates, unless they are making from somewhere else. In India higher costs are due to exchange and govt related not brokerage.

posts.author: Ashutosh_Meena
posts.text: Brokerage charges comparison — We do have that I think.

posts.author: iankurseth
posts.text: Brokerage charges comparison — We are so lucky that all our brokers have banded together and come up with the magic number of ₹20. Ohterwise we may have seen competition pushing them to lower rates. Imagine have to pay less than ₹20 per order! Yikes! How awful it must be.

posts.text: Brokerage charges comparison — On general I was seeing the brokerage charges across the world. When I saw & checked Indian system is more complex compared to other economies.
